stocks.nameEn: The Chugoku Electric Power Co., Inc.

headlines.title: Yen hits 40-year low as Japan touts intervention and U.S. support - CHOSUNBIZ
Japan and South Korea Stocks Bloodied at Open, Kioxia Tumbles 10%, Samsung and SK Hynix Plunge 7%
Traders plot worst-case scenario for yen if currency crisis hits
‘Fine for others to pay more’: can Japan attract more overseas tourists while charging them extra?
The Japanese yen is at a 40-year low. Here’s why that matters
The Japanese Yen dares Tokyo to defend a line it won't name
Japanese yen weakens further on Fed rate hike expectations

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 엔화 가치 급락으로 인해 상당한 압박을 받고 있습니다. 엔화는 연방준비제도(Fed)의 추가 금리 인상 기대감 속에 40년 만에 최저치를 기록하며, 일본 정부의 개입 가능성과 미국 지원 논의를 촉발했습니다. 시장에서는 통화 위기 발생 시 최악의 시나리오를 대비하는 움직임이 포착되며, 엔화 약세는 일본과 한국 증시의 주요 기술주를 포함한 전반적인 하락세를 이끌고 있습니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese markets are under significant pressure today, primarily driven by the yen's depreciation to a 40-year low. This historic weakness is fueled by expectations of further Fed rate hikes, prompting discussions of potential Japanese government intervention and U.S. support. Traders are reportedly plotting worst-case scenarios amidst fears of a currency crisis, with the yen's slide contributing to sharp declines in Japanese and South Korean stocks, including major tech firms.
